sections.biography-source-undefined:
Wang the Tiger is a fictional character from Capcom’s Destiny of an Emperor. While Liu Bei works to pacify Jingzhou, Wang can be encountered in Wuling (“Grr…”) and again in Changsha (“Sick ’em, Wang!”) accompanying her female handler.

Despite playing a minor role in Destiny of an Emperor, Wang the Tiger has become a beloved mascot of sorts for this site, making various Easter egg appearances, and has made even more appearances at Simulated RTK. Wang also made an appearance as a hidden boss and playable character in the “Destiny of an Emperor 2.0” mod.

Wang the Tiger 王虎
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang the Tiger (王虎)was born in Jingzhou. Wang the Tiger is a character in Destiny of an Emperor. “Sick ’em, Wang…” Wang the Tiger is a fictional character.Wang the Tigeris an original character from the gameDestiny of an Emperorproduced by Capcom for theNintendo Entertainment System(NES). Wang the Tiger was affiliated with Wang. Wang the Tiger lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

BiographySource Undefined
Wang the Tiger is a fictional character from Capcom’s Destiny of an Emperor. While Liu Bei works to pacify Jingzhou, Wang can be encountered in Wuling (“Grr…”) and again in Changsha (“Sick ’em, Wang!”) accompanying her female handler.
Despite playing a minor role in Destiny of an Emperor, Wang the Tiger has become a beloved mascot of sorts for this site, making various Easter egg appearances, and has made even more appearances atSimulated RTK. Wang also made an appearance as a hidden boss and playable character in the “Destiny of an Emperor 2.0” mod.
